titles.title: Providing for consideration of the joint resolution (H.J. Res. 143) enabling Congress to advance important policies.
Providing for consideration of the joint resolution (H.J. Res. 143) enabling Congress to advance important policies.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Rules.

bill.summary: This resolution provides for the consideration of the joint resolution (H.J. Res. 143) enabling Congress to advance important policies.
